# 3D craft models

- **`craft.glb`** — bundled SAL FC placeholder quad (QUADX). Re-run `npm run bake-model` after editing `scripts/bake-craft.mjs` to regenerate it.
- **Custom model** — replace `craft.glb` with your own **GLB** (keep the name) or adjust `scripts/bake-craft.mjs`. For prop spin in QUADX view, name prop meshes `PROP_0` … `PROP_3` (see bake script).

Do not copy Betaflight configurator assets unless your project matches their license.
